chrome.splitToggle: Split the screen / leave split mode
split.title: How should the screen split?
split.sub: Each pane runs an independent session — to the same or different hosts.
split.subRemote: Each pane is an independent remote-desktop session — to the same or different hosts.
split.subGame: Each pane is an independent game-stream session — to the same or different hosts.
input.assignDesc: Lock each keyboard/mouse/controller to a pane — separate players use separate gear (couch co-op). An unlocked device follows the focused pane.
split.modeGameHint: Host launches the app and captures its window
split.modeWindowHint: Pick an open window on the host
split.windowNeedsSession: Window capture needs a session already connected to this host
connErr.relayDown: Could not reach the relay server — check your internet connection and the relay setting.
connErr.peerUnreachable: Device could not be reached — it may be offline, or the ID is wrong.
connErr.notOnline: You are not online yet — go online first.
connErr.p2pFailed: Direct connection failed and relay use is disabled (see Network settings).
connErr.unreachable: Could not connect to the target — check the address and your network.
connErr.timeout: Connection timed out — the handshake did not complete in time. The device may be offline or unreachable.
connErr.incompatibleVersion: Relay requires a newer version — please update Pulsar.
host.chatEmpty: Messages from connected devices show up here.
pw.title: Host password
pw.lead: Enter the one-time password shown on the host — or the host can approve without a password by clicking Allow.
home.title: Connect
home.sub: Share your ID or connect to a remote device.
home.idOrIp: Enter an ID or IP · e.g. 192.168.1.42
home.unattendedWarn: The one-time password is disabled. Anyone who can reach this PC’s ID can connect without approval.
home.help: This ID is assigned by the relay server. If you share it, others can connect to your device; the link is made over P2P first, falling back to the relay if needed. The password is renewed after every session.
home.noHostGames: No games published on the host (or the host is offline).
home.noRecents: No connections yet. They appear here once you connect to an ID.
gaming.title: Connect to a host
gaming.noRecents: No connections yet. They appear here once you connect to a device.
recent.name: Name
recent.imageHint: Pick an icon or upload a picture
devices.title: Devices
devices.sub: Your address book — saved and recently connected peers.
devices.name: Device name
devices.emptyBody: Once you connect to an ID, or save one with Add device, it shows up here.
devices.lanScanning: Scanning… Pulsar devices on this network appear here.
devices.imageHint: Pick an icon or upload a picture
settings.title: Settings
settings.sub: Manage streaming, network and security preferences.
settings.sectionStreamingDesc: What this device receives when connecting to a host: codec, decoder, frame pacing and viewing prefs.
settings.sectionHostDesc: What this device sends when it shares its screen: resolution, encoder, HDR and audio transmit.
settings.qualityDesc: New sessions start with this profile.
settings.encoderDesc: Pick a hardware encoder; "Software" uses the CPU. "Automatic" picks the best hardware.
settings.decoderDesc: Client-side video decoder. "Software" uses the CPU; "Automatic" picks the best hardware.
settings.framePacingDesc: Buffer ~1-2 frames and present at a steady cadence to smooth network/decode jitter (adds a little latency). Off = lowest latency. Linux native renderer.
settings.nativePlayerDesc: Render video in a hardware-accelerated native window (ffplay) instead of the webview — far less CPU/GPU. Windows. Fullscreen; exit with Ctrl+Shift+F12.
settings.audioTransmitDesc: Send this host’s audio to the client (host → client).
settings.audioMuteDesc: Silence the host speakers while streaming; sound plays only on the client. Auto-on in game mode.
settings.audioInputDesc: Capture device (empty = platform default). The list is the currently available capture devices and refreshes itself if a device is unplugged.
settings.displayNameDesc: The name shown to the other side when you connect.
settings.avatarDesc: How you present yourself to peers: account photo, desktop wallpaper, or anonymous.
controllers.title: Controllers
controllers.reorderHint: Use the arrows to change the player slot order.
controllers.bothModes: Controllers are forwarded in both remote desktop and game streaming sessions.
host.viewOnlyDesc: Revoke/restore this client's control — its input is ignored while the stream keeps running.
settings.nodePortDesc: Listen port for direct/P2P connections. Left empty, a random port is picked each launch (the box shows the one in use); pin one for port forwarding. Going online fails with an error if the chosen port is taken.
settings.connMethodDesc: Recommended: Automatic. Pulsar tries direct P2P first and falls back to the relay if that fails.
settings.relayDesc: Your device ID is issued here, and traffic flows through it when P2P can’t be established.
settings.unattendedDesc: Allow connecting with a fixed password, without approval.
settings.twofaDesc: Require an extra confirmation code for incoming connections.
settings.twofaBlocked: Unavailable while unattended access is on: unattended connections skip the approval step entirely, so a second factor cannot apply.
settings.connectPwDesc: Persistent custom password: clients that know it connect without the approval popup, alongside the one-time password. Wrong attempts are rate-limited.
settings.recordDesc: Save remote-access sessions to local disk.
settings.requestAdminDesc: Ask for admin rights on launch — required so a host can remotely control elevated windows (Task Manager, installers, "Run as administrator"). Restart the app to apply.
settings.trayDesc: Stay in the tray in the background when closed.
settings.debugDesc: Show the connection activity log on the home page (debugging).
settings.uiHwaccelDesc: Draws the app's OWN interface (menus, settings) with the GPU — SEPARATE from the video stream's encode/decode. Default OFF on the Orange Pi 5 (a driver bug can freeze it); on elsewhere. A change applies after an app restart.
settings.streamDefaultsDesc: Resolution, frame rate and bit rate used when this device hosts a stream.
games.title: Games
games.sub: Games/programs to stream from the host.
games.emptyBody: Add a game/program with Add game, or scan a folder below.
games.scanNeedFolder: Add a folder to scan first.
connecting.slowHint: Taking longer than expected — the host may be offline, or a firewall may be blocking the connection.
session.videoErr: Could not establish the video connection.
session.streamStopped: Stream stopped — the host may have stopped screen sharing.
session.waiting: The host is preparing the video — approve the screen-share permission.
session.av1Native: AV1 isn’t supported in the in-app viewer yet — enable the native viewer (settings) or pick H.264/H.265.
session.controlOffSame: Control disabled on the same device · use a second device for remote control
settings.overlayButtonDesc: Always-visible Pulsar button over the video that opens the overlay menu.
settings.statsHudDesc: Keep the performance stats in the video corner even while the overlay is closed.
session.clickToControl: Click the screen to take control
session.nativeActive: Playing in the native viewer (fullscreen) · exit: Ctrl+Shift+F12
session.nativeClickToControl: Click the video to take control · end: Ctrl+Shift+Q
session.nativeControlling: In control · release: 3×RightCtrl · end: Ctrl+Shift+Q · fullscreen: Ctrl+Shift+F12
audio.noWebcodecs: This webview cannot decode WebCodecs audio (audio off).
session.fileTooBig: File is too large (50 MB max).
files.windowTitle: File manager — tied to this session
session.chatEmpty: No messages yet. Say hi first.
overlay.title: Game menu
overlay.resume: Click the screen or press Ctrl+Shift+M to resume
approve.title: Connection request
approve.lead: A device wants to connect to this computer.
approve.pwNone: You can approve without a password, or wait for one
settings.autoUpdateDesc: When a new version is found, download, install and relaunch without asking. When off, updates show as a badge in the top bar and installing is up to you.
update.noSelfUpdate: This install can't update itself (package-manager/Flatpak install, or an AppImage launched without FUSE). Update via your package manager, or download the new version from the GitHub Releases page.
